ListItem.Para: Airplane is not operated in precipitation within five statute miles of airport of departure or intended landing.
CAT II and CAT III Approaches are not conducted.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative provided associated high speed function is verified to operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify associated high speed function operates normally (AMM DDG 30-42-01).

ListItem.Para: Clean associated windshield and supply water to the windshield before operating the wiper.
Set associated wiper/washer panel (P5) wiper switch to HIGH.
Confirm windshield wiper high speed function operates normally.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One may be inoperative provided associated low speed function is verified to operate normally.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify associated low speed function operates normally (AMM DDG 30-42-01).

ListItem.Para: Clean associated windshield and supply water to the windshield before operating the wiper.
Set associated wiper/washer panel (P5) wiper switch to LOW.
Confirm windshield wiper low speed function operates normally.
Both low speed functions are verified to operate normally.
Airplane is not operated in known or forecast precipitation of moderate or greater intensity within 5 statute miles of the airport of departure or intended landing.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify low speed function operates normally (AMM DDG 30-42-01).

ListItem.Para: Clean windshield and supply water to the windshield before operating the wipers.
Set wiper/washer panel (P5) wiper switches to LOW.
Confirm windshield wipers low speed function operates normally.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: One or both may be inoperative.
